# Object Diagram — RAG Refinement System (worked "warranty" example)

```mermaid
graph TB
    doc["doc : Document<br/>doc_id = doc_abc123<br/>title = Product Manual<br/>total_pages = 200<br/>fallback_only = false"]

    secW["secWarranty : Section<br/>section_id = sec_warranty<br/>title = Warranty & Support<br/>level = 1<br/>page_start = 142, page_end = 148"]
    secIntro["secIntro : Section<br/>section_id = sec_intro<br/>title = Introduction<br/>page_start = 1, page_end = 3"]

    chunk1["chunk1 : Chunk<br/>chunk_id = chk_001<br/>section_id = sec_warranty<br/>page = 142"]
    chunk2["chunk2 : Chunk<br/>chunk_id = chk_002<br/>section_id = sec_warranty<br/>page = 147"]

    route["route : RouterOutput<br/>fallback = false<br/>routing_time_ms = 210<br/>rationale = 'Query matches Warranty section'"]
    rel["rel : RelevantSection<br/>section_id = sec_warranty<br/>confidence = 0.94<br/>page_start = 142, page_end = 148"]
    cite["cite : Citation<br/>section_title = Warranty & Support<br/>page_start = 142, page_end = 148"]

    doc --> secW
    doc --> secIntro
    secW --> chunk1
    secW --> chunk2
    route --> rel
    rel -.->|section_id| secW
    cite -.->|page within| secW
```

> Concrete instances of Document/Section/Chunk/RouterOutput/RelevantSection/Citation from the PRD §8.2 / §2.3 warranty example. No invented attributes.
